# qsl differential-testing fixture: command stream + events + rejections + snapshot
version 1
meta seed 40 symbols 3 orders 120 max_qty 20 max_notional 1000
cmd reg S0
cmd reg S1
cmd reg S2
cmd limit 2 1 B 104 0 IOC
reject new_limit 1 InvalidQuantity
cmd cancel 2 2
reject cancel 2 UnknownOrder

evt accept 1 1 2
